scenario: Customer has a Health Basic policy active for 40 days and is claiming hospitalization expenses. The policy has a 60-day waiting period for hospitalization claims.
Customer has a Health Premium policy active for 120 days and is claiming emergency surgery expenses. Emergency surgeries are covered after the 60-day waiting period.
Customer has a Vehicle Standard policy that expired last month. The customer is claiming accident repair costs from an accident that occurred yesterday.
Customer has a Vehicle Premium policy with collision coverage active. The customer is claiming repair costs after an accident.
Customer has a Travel Shield policy and lost baggage during a covered international trip. Baggage loss is included in coverage.
Customer has a Health Basic policy active for 20 days and is claiming treatment for a pre-existing condition. Pre-existing conditions are covered only after 365 days.
Customer has a Health Premium policy active for 500 days and is claiming treatment for a pre-existing condition. Pre-existing conditions are covered after 365 days.
Customer has a Vehicle Premium policy active. The customer is claiming engine damage caused by driving through flood water. Flood-related engine damage is excluded from coverage.
Customer has a Travel Shield policy active during an international trip. The customer incurred emergency medical expenses abroad, which are included in coverage.
Customer has a Travel Shield policy that expired before the trip started. The customer is claiming trip cancellation expenses.
Customer has a Home Secure policy active. A fire damaged part of the insured property. Fire damage is included in coverage.
Customer has a Home Secure policy active. The customer is claiming damage caused by gradual wear and tear. Wear and tear is excluded from coverage.
Customer has a Vehicle Standard policy active with a coverage limit of $5000. The customer is claiming accident repair costs of $7000.
Customer has a Vehicle Premium policy active with a coverage limit of $15000. The customer is claiming accident repair costs of $8000.
Customer has a Health Premium policy active for 200 days. The customer is claiming hospitalization expenses for a covered illness after completing the waiting period.
